education.institution: Noida Institute of Engineering and Technology
education.degree: B.Tech Computer Science and Business Systems

experience.title: AI/ML Virtual Intern
experience.description: Developed an LLM-powered stock screener using py, SQL and Streamlit. Designed backend workflows for converting natural language investment queries into SQL operations. Integrated OpenRouter APIs for intelligent stock recommendations. Improved response quality using prompt engineering. Built modular backend components following software engineering principles.
bullets: Developed an LLM-powered stock screener using py, SQL and Streamlit.
Designed backend workflows for converting natural language investment queries into SQL operations.
Integrated OpenRouter APIs for intelligent stock recommendations.
Improved response quality using prompt engineering.
Built modular backend components following software engineering principles.
